text: Now let me check more candidates and analyze the rest of `send_with_retry` and `ingest_chunk`. Let me specifically look at send_with_retry in both files:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "cat > /tmp/analyze2.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Anthropic send_with_retry (397-459)
echo "=== AnthropicClient::send_with_retry (anthropic.rs 397-459) ==="
sed -n '397,459p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs
branches=$(sed -n '397,459p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 62, Branch count: $branches"
echo ""

# OpenAI send_with_retry (157-186)
echo "=== OpenAiCompatClient::send_with_retry (openai_compat.rs 157-186) ==="
sed -n '157,186p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs
branches=$(sed -n '157,186p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 29, Branch count: $branches"
echo ""

# translate_message (675-726)
echo "=== translate_message (openai_compat.rs 675-726) ==="
sed -n '675,726p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs
branches=$(sed -n '675,726p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/openai_compat.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 51, Branch count: $branches"
echo ""

# resolve_startup_auth_source (593-631)
echo "=== resolve_startup_auth_source (anthropic.rs 593-631) ==="
sed -n '593,631p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs
branches=$(sed -n '593,631p' rust/crates/api/src/providers/anthropic.rs | grep -c '\(if\|match\|for\|while\|?\|loop\|=>\)')
echo "Line count: 38, Branch count: $branches"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/analyze2.sh
/tmp/analyze2.sh
"}
